category_sources: Official libslack daemon page describes daemon as performing daemon setup tasks for other processes.
source_facts.description says daemon turns other processes into daemons.
display_name_sources: Official libslack homepage heading identifies the project as daemon.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official libslack daemon page and includes Documentation and manual-entry links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official libslack daemon page provides release/source archives and documentation, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official libslack daemon page describes PID files, syslog redirection, respawning, user/group selection, and daemon setup behavior.
source_facts.description says it turns processes into daemons.
